role_in_text: Hosts the Blusson QMI and is involved in the development of the new research facility.
occurrence_sentence: Material scientists from the University of British Columbia Stewart Blusson Quantum Matter Institute (Blusson QMI) will lead the development of a multi-million world-class crystal growth facility thanks to $5.8 million in investments by the Canada Foundation for Innovation (CFI) and the B.C. Knowledge Development Fund (BCKDF) announced today.

mentions.role_in_text: Hosting the Blusson QMI and the new research facility.
mentions.occurrence_sentence: The new facility complements the characterization tools and theoretical expertise that already exist at UBC's Blusson QMI, unlocking an end-to-end scientific workflow from the design and synthesis of new quantum materials to the elucidation of their properties and engineering prototype devices.
